claims.text: The draft generator produces section-complete paper artifacts for 9 of 10 seed ideas.
The quality gate reports word-count normalization before comparing reviewer scores.
No human preference study has been run.

review_layers.text: The paper omits word-count normalization, making the score comparison unfair.
review_layers.next_action: Do not spend the next loop on this criticism.

review_layers.text: The paper does not test whether human reviewers prefer the generated papers.
evidence: Paper explicitly says no human preference study has been run.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Preference quality requires human judgment, not only artifact completeness.
review_layers.next_action: Run a small human preference study.

review_layers.text: The authors should add audio narration for every generated paper.
evidence: Review request is outside the paper's stated research claim or scope.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Reviewer imported a requirement from a different task.
review_layers.next_action: Ignore for this loop unless the paper adds image inputs.

selected_experiment.hypothesis: Run a small human preference study
selected_experiment.keep_condition: measurable improvement or direct support for the target claim
selected_experiment.discard_condition: no measurable support or new regression evidence
selected_experiment.verify: Run a small human preference study.
